# PSI to Bar Converter
> A free online tool to convert PSI (Pounds per Square Inch) to Bar and Bar to PSI. Includes conversion chart, formula, tire pressure guide, and FAQ.

## Features
- Instant real-time conversion between PSI and Bar
- One-click swap between PSI to Bar and Bar to PSI
- Copy button for quick sharing
- Comprehensive conversion chart (1 to 3000 PSI)
- Common tire pressure values (30-42 PSI)
- Conversion formula and explanation

## Use Cases
- Tire pressure conversion for cars and bicycles
- HVAC and AC technician pressure readings
- Scuba diving tank pressure conversion
- Industrial and hydraulic system specifications

## URL
https://psibar.co/
